title: helianthus exasperatus
intro: Helianthus exasperatus, also known as the rough-leaved sunflower or rough sunflower, is a plant species of the sunflower family, native to the Great Plains of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helianthus exasperatus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions. Helianthus exasperatus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin issues and wounds.
